text.rich: When you play me, you may play a spell from your trash with Energy cost no more than :rb_energy_3:, ignoring its Energy cost. Recycle that spell after you play it. (You must still pay its Power cost.)
text.plain: When you play me, you may play a spell from your trash with Energy cost no more than :rb_energy_3:, ignoring its Energy cost. Recycle that spell after you play it. (You must still pay its Power cost.)
